name: documentation-app
description: MenschDocs - Electron desktop with local Flask backend
author: MenschDocs

scripts.dev: npm run build:electron-ts && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,electron -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cross-env DOCAPP_PORT=5000 npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build:frontend: vite build --config frontend/vite.config.ts && node scripts/copy-static.mjs && node scripts/write-build-info.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron-ts && npm run build:icons
scripts.dist: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && npm run build && npm run build:python && node scripts/verify-build.mjs && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --dir && node scripts/embed-win-icon.mjs && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --prepackaged release/win-unpacked && node scripts/verify-packaged.mjs
